---
title: &TITLE Alexander James
first: Alexander
last: James
people_group: pastmember
email: ""
subtitle: Alumnus, University of Southern California
key_areas: "Paleoclimatology, Nonlinear timeseries analysis, Pyleoclim & Ammonyte development"
website: "https://www.deepbluegeophysics.com/about"
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs
  contents:
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
